Part.Source:
&IsGravar = false
if &NfsArqXml.IsEmpty() &XmlReader.Open(&FileSource) Else &XmlReader.OpenFromString(&NfsArqXml) Endif
&ret = &XmlReader.ReadType(1, 'CompNfse') if &ret <> 0 //LEITURA XML &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'CompNfse' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Nfse' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'Nfse' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'NfseCancelamento' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'NfseCancelamento' EndCAse
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo Else &ret = &XmlReader.ReadType(1, 'NfseCancelamento') if &ret <> 0 //LEITURA XML &XmlReader.Read() do 'NfseCancelamento' EndIf EndIf
&OutXmlCompNFSe = &CompNfse.ToXml()
Sub 'NfseCancelamento' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'NfseCancelamento' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'DataHora' &CompNfse.NfseCancelamento.DataHora = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CodigoCancelamento' &CompNfse.NfseCancelamento.CodigoCancelamento = &XmlReader.Value EndCAse
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
Sub 'Nfse' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'Nfse' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'InfNfse' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'InfNfse' EndCAse
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
Sub 'InfNfse' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'InfNfse' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Numero' and &CompNfse.Nfse.Numero.IsEmpty() &CompNfse.Nfse.Numero = &XmlReader.Value
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CodigoVerificacao' &CompNfse.Nfse.CodigoVerificacao = &XmlReader.Value &IsGravar = true
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'DataEmissao' &CompNfse.Nfse.DataEmissao = &XmlReader.Value
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'BaseCalculo' &CompNfse.Nfse.ValoresNfse.BaseCalculo = val(&XmlReader.Value)
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Aliquota' &CompNfse.Nfse.ValoresNfse.Aliquota = val(&XmlReader.Value)
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ValorIss' &CompNfse.Nfse.ValoresNfse.ValorIss = val(&XmlReader.Value)
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ValorLiquidoNfse' &CompNfse.Nfse.ValoresNfse.ValorLiquidoNfse = val(&XmlReader.Value)
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CodigoMunicipio' and &CompNfse.OrgaoGerador.CodigoMunicipio.IsEmpty() &CompNfse.OrgaoGerador.CodigoMunicipio.FromString(&XmlReader.Value)
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico'
CAse &XmlReader.Name = 'ChaveAcesso' &CompNfse.ChaveAcesso.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) EndCAse
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
Sub 'DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico' EndCAse
&XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag...
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
Sub 'InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Rps' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'Rps' CAse &XmlReader.Name = 'Competencia' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Competencia.FromString(&XmlReader.Value)
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Prestador' &XmlReader.Read() do 'Prestador' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Tomador' &XmlReader.Read() do 'Tomador' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'RegimeEspecialTributacao' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.RegimeEspecialTributacao.FromString(&XmlReader.Value)
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Servico' &XmlReader.Read() do 'Servico' EndCAse
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
Sub 'Rps' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'Rps' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'IdentificacaoRps' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'IdentificacaoRps'
case &XmlReader.Name = 'DataEmissao' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Rps.DataEmissao.FromString(&XmlReader.Value)
case &XmlReader.Name = 'Status' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Rps.Status.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) EndCAse
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
Sub 'IdentificacaoRps' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'IdentificacaoRps' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Numero' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Rps.IdentificacaoRps.Numero.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Serie' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Rps.IdentificacaoRps.Serie.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Tipo' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Rps.IdentificacaoRps.Tipo.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
sub 'Prestador' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'Prestador' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Cnpj' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Prestador.CpfCnpj.Cnpj.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Cpf' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Prestador.CpfCnpj.Cpf.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'InscricaoMunicipal' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Prestador.InscricaoMunicipal.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
sub 'Servico' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'Servico' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ValorServicos' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorServicos.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ValorDeducoes' //&CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorDeducoes.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'RetidoPis' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.RetidoPis.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ValorPis' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorPis.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'RetidoCofins' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.RetidoCofins.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ValorCofins' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorCofins.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'RetidoInss' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.RetidoInss.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ValorInss' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorInss.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'RetidoIr' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.RetidoIr.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ValorIr' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorIr.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'RetidoCsll' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.RetidoCsll.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ValorCsll' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorCsll.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'RetidoCpp' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.RetidoCpp.FromString(&XmlReader.Value)
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ValorCpp' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorCpp.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'OutrasRetencoes' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.OutrasRetencoes.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'RetidoOutrasRetencoes' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.RetidoOutrasRetencoes.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ValorIss' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.ValorIss.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Aliquota' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.Aliquota.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'DescontoIncondicionado' // &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.DescontoIncondicionado.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'DescontoCondicionado' // &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Valores.DescontoCondicionado.FromString(&XmlReader.Value)
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Discriminacao' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.Discriminacao.FromString(&XmlReader.Value)
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'IssRetido' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.IssRetido.FromString(&XmlReader.Value)
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CodigoMunicipio' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.CodigoMunicipio.FromString(&XmlReader.Value)
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ListaItensServico' &XmlReader.Read() do 'ListaItensServico' EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
sub 'ListaItensServico' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'ListaItensServico'
if &XmlReader.Name = 'ItemServico' &SdtNFseItem = new() &XmlReader.Read() do 'ItemServico' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Servico.ListaItensServicoItem.Add(&SdtNFseItem) EndIf
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
Sub 'ItemServico'
Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'ItemServico'
Do CAse CAse &XmlReader.Name = 'ItemListaServico' &SdtNFseItem.ItemListaServico = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CodigoCnae' &SdtNFseItem.CodigoCnae = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Descricao' &SdtNFseItem.Descricao = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Tributavel' &SdtNFseItem.Tributavel = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Quantidade' &SdtNFseItem.Quantidade = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ValorUnitario' &SdtNFseItem.ValorUnitario = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ValorDesconto' &SdtNFseItem.ValorDesconto = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ValorLiquido' &SdtNFseItem.ValorLiquido = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo
EndSub
sub 'Tomador' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'Tomador' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Cnpj' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.IdentificacaoTomador.cpfCnpj.Cnpj.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Cpf' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.IdentificacaoTomador.cpfCnpj.Cpf.FromString(&XmlReader.Value)
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'InscricaoMunicipal' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.IdentificacaoTomador.InscricaoMunicipal.FromString(&XmlReader.Value)
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'RazaoSocial' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.RazaoSocial.FromString(&XmlReader.Value)
//Endereco Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Endereco' and &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.Endereco.Endereco.IsEmpty() &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.Endereco.Endereco.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Numero' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.Endereco.Numero.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Bairro' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.Endereco.Bairro.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CodigoMunicipio' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.Endereco.CodigoMunicipio.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Uf' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.Endereco.Uf.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Cep' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.Endereco.Cep.FromString(&XmlReader.Value)
//contato Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Telefone' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.Contato.Telefone.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Email' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.Contato.Email.FromString(&XmlReader.Value)
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'InscricaoEstadual' &CompNfse.DeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.InfDeclaracaoPrestacaoServico.Tomador.InscricaoEstadual.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
